known_official_fragments.text: - `high-risk` is mandatory for migrations, auth/access, billing/orders, Jenkins, container or production deployment work. It cannot be downgraded and must run the real `gate_full`, then use `verify` for Jenkins and target-environment evidence.
known_official_fragments.replacement: - Migrations, auth/access, billing/orders, Jenkins, container, and production deployment work are high-risk for analysis, design, and review depth; the automatic local gate remains changed-scope and push ends coding.

known_official_fragments.text: 7. Run the resolved changed/standard/full gate. High-risk work must use the configured real full command and then verify Jenkins/target surfaces before `PASS`.
known_official_fragments.replacement: 7. Run the configured changed-scope fast gate once, commit and push, then stop; Jenkins and target acceptance are owner-managed unless a separate diagnostic task is requested.

known_official_fragments.text: - Version 2.2 resolves `auto` to micro/standard/high-risk, enforces a strict real full gate for high-risk work, and selects roles dynamically.
- The repo-local auto-coding-skill 2.2 workflow resolves `auto` into `micro`, `standard`, or `high-risk`; high-risk always uses a real full gate and verify-style closure.
- `high-risk`: configured full gate; changed/standard fallback is invalid.
known_official_fragments.replacement: - `high-risk` increases analysis, design, and review depth; it still uses the configured changed-scope fast gate for normal development.

known_official_fragments.text: - `docs/ENGINEERING.md` uses auto-coding-skill 2.2 profiles: `micro`, `standard`, and `high-risk`. `auto` selects one profile; high-risk always requires a real full gate and verify closure.
- `high-risk`: the real `gate_full`; changed/standard fallback is forbidden
known_official_fragments.replacement: - `high-risk`: deeper analysis, design, and review with the same changed-scope fast development gate

known_official_fragments.text: 7. For high-risk, pass full locally, commit/push, verify configured Jenkins and target surfaces, then record `PASS`, `FAIL`, or `PARTIAL` from actual evidence.
known_official_fragments.replacement: 7. Run the changed-scope fast gate once, commit/push, and record `DEV-CLOSED`; Jenkins and target acceptance are owner-managed unless requested as a separate diagnostic task.

known_official_fragments.text: - Let `workflow.profile: auto` resolve the effective `micro`, `standard`, or `high-risk` path. High-risk signals force a real full gate and verified closure even when the configured baseline mode is `dev`.
- `micro` uses the changed gate, `standard` uses the standard gate, and `high-risk` must execute `commands.gate_full`; a light or standard fallback never counts as full verification.

- After push, verify Jenkins build and production target health when the effective profile is high-risk, the configured mode is `verify`, or the user explicitly requests it. Use `--allow-no-deploy` only for docs-only sync verification.
- Dockerfiles, compose, Jenkins, workflow tooling, auth/payment, and database changes automatically enter the high-risk/full path.
known_official_fragments.replacement: - Dockerfiles, Compose, Jenkins, workflow tooling, auth/payment, and database changes are high-risk for analysis, design, and review; they do not expand the automatic local gate beyond changed-scope.

known_official_fragments.text: - Runtime/config/schema changes require the full gate declared in `docs/ENGINEERING.md`.
known_official_fragments.replacement: - Runtime/config/schema changes are high-risk for analysis, design, and review; normal development still runs only the changed-scope fast gate.

known_official_fragments.text: - `high-risk` cannot be downgraded and must execute `commands.gate_full`; changed or standard fallbacks do not count. Use `PASS / FAIL / PARTIAL` only from the required executed evidence.

- Micro work uses the changed gate and dev closure; ordinary product work uses the
  standard three-stack gate and dev closure; DB, auth, dependency, deployment,
  Jenkins, Docker, Compose, or MediaMTX changes use the real full gate and verify closure.
- High-risk signals cannot be downgraded. Jenkins and target verification run only
  after commit/push when the effective profile is high-risk or verification is explicit.
known_official_fragments.replacement:
- DB, auth, dependency, deployment, Jenkins, Docker, Compose, and MediaMTX changes are high-risk for analysis, design, and review; every normal task still uses one changed-scope fast gate and push closure.
- Jenkins and target verification are owner-managed after push and run only in a separately requested diagnostic task.

known_official_fragments.text: - For any non-trivial code, config, deployment, database, UI, or docs change, follow the repo-local auto-coding-skill 2.2 workflow.

- `high-risk`: DB, auth/access/account, content security, files/object storage, client contracts, gateway/deployment/build/tooling, or explicit verify work; run the real `gate_full`, commit/push, verify Jenkins and target surfaces, then record `PASS`, `FAIL`, or `PARTIAL`.
known_official_fragments.replacement: - DB, auth/access/account, content security, files/object storage, client contracts, and gateway/deployment/build/tooling changes are high-risk for analysis, design, and review; normal development still uses the changed-scope fast gate and push completion.

known_official_fragments.text: - High-risk signals cannot be downgraded. A changed/standard gate cannot substitute for full.
- Local Docker startup/runtime checks remain opt-in by task scope; high-risk local full still requires all configured non-runtime build/test/static checks.
known_official_fragments.replacement: - Local Docker startup/runtime checks remain opt-in and run only for a separately requested diagnostic task, not as part of the automatic development gate.

known_official_fragments.text: 本项目要求 Jenkins 和目标环境验证。high-risk 本地 full 通过后提交推送，再以真实 Jenkins、健康检查、API、页面或业务路径证据记录 `PASS`、`FAIL` 或 `PARTIAL`。未执行的验证不得写成通过。
本项目要求 Jenkins 和目标环境验证。high-risk 本地 full 通过后提交推送，再以真实 Jenkins、目标健康、API、小程序/管理端或业务路径证据记录 `PASS`、`FAIL` 或 `PARTIAL`。未执行的验证不得写成通过。

`workflow.profile: auto` 只负责选择最终档位。高风险路径、声明为
`profile: high-risk` 的规则、显式 full 或 verify 都不可被命令行降级。
高风险任务必须执行 `commands.gate_full`；changed、standard、light gate
或单项测试不能冒充 full gate。

6. micro/standard 写 `DEV-CLOSED` 后 commit + push；high-risk 先完成 real
   full，再 commit + push，并继续 Jenkins/目标环境验证后记录
   `PASS`、`FAIL` 或 `PARTIAL`。

known_official_fragments.text:
- `high-risk`: authentication, payment, database, gateway, deployment, build
  configuration, or workflow tooling. Run the real `gate_full` and use verified
  closure.

A high-risk signal cannot be downgraded by a CLI flag. The full path must execute
`commands.gate_full`; a light or standard fallback is not equivalent.
known_official_fragments.replacement: - Authentication, payment, database, gateway, deployment, build configuration, and workflow-tooling changes are high-risk for analysis, design, and review; normal development still uses the changed-scope fast gate.

known_official_fragments.text:
Jenkins and target verification are enabled for this repository. High-risk work
therefore requires the full local gate, push-triggered Jenkins evidence, and the
configured target health/business checks before a PASS closure. Do not claim a
matrix or deployment result from a command that did not run.
known_official_fragments.replacement: Jenkins and target surfaces exist for this repository, but they are owner-managed after push and are not part of normal coding completion. Do not claim a matrix or deployment result from a command that did not run.

known_official_fragments.text:
`auto` is only a selector. The effective profile is always `micro`, `standard`,
or `high-risk`. A high-risk signal cannot be downgraded with a CLI flag or a
project rule. An explicit non-auto profile replaces auto's low/normal baseline.
`workflow.mode: verify` also requires the full gate.

Project `gate.rules` may declare `paths`, `commands`, `scope`, and an optional
`profile`. Configure `commands.gate_full` (or legacy `commands.full_gate`) for
high-risk work; a light or standard command does not count as a full gate.

High-risk or explicit verification:

1. Run the real full gate.
2. Commit and push.
3. Verify enabled CI/Jenkins and target-environment surfaces.
4. Record `PASS`, `FAIL`, or `PARTIAL` from actual evidence.

python3 docs/tools/autopipeline/ap.py light-gate --scope full --profile high-risk --mode verify --explain
